signup.title: Create Account
signup.alert: Please fill in all required fields

policy.termsIntro: By using TaxBuddy, you agree to the following:
policy.terms1: You must provide accurate and up-to-date information
policy.terms2: Do not use the system for illegal purposes
policy.terms3: Tax calculations are estimates and not legal or financial advice
policy.terms4: We reserve the right to update services without prior notice
policy.terms5: This app is not affiliated with the Revenue Department
policy.privacyIntro: TaxBuddy values your personal data privacy
policy.privacy1: We may collect data such as name, email, and financial data to provide services
policy.privacy2: Your data will not be sold to third parties
policy.privacy4: You can request to edit or delete your data anytime
policy.privacy5: Continued use of the app implies acceptance of this policy
